'''havutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oshona|oshona]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-v-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oshona|oshona]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| havutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hævitith|hævitith]] || [[word:hævitij|hævitij]] || [[word:hævitish|hævitish]] || [[word:hæviti|hæviti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:havuvututh|havuvututh]] || [[word:havuvutuj|havuvutuj]] || [[word:havuvutush|havuvutush]] || [[word:havuvutu|havuvutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:havututh|havututh]] || [[word:havutuj|havutuj]] || [[word:havutush|havutush]] || [[word:havutu|havutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:havuftuth|havuftuth]] || [[word:havuftuj|havuftuj]] || [[word:havuftush|havuftush]] || [[word:havuftuf|havuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:havututhu|havututhu]] || [[word:havutuju|havutuju]] || [[word:havutushu|havutushu]] || [[word:havutuku|havutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:havututh|havututh]] || [[word:havutuj|havutuj]] || [[word:havutush|havutush]] || [[word:havutu|havutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:havututhul|havututhul]] || [[word:havutujul|havutujul]] || [[word:havutushul|havutushul]] || [[word:havutukul|havutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:havututhuthu|havututhuthu]] || [[word:havutujuju|havutujuju]] || [[word:havutushushu|havutushushu]] || [[word:havutuku|havutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:havututhun|havututhun]] || [[word:havutujun|havutujun]] || [[word:havutushun|havutushun]] || [[word:havutukun|havutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:havututhuoro|havututhuoro]] || [[word:havutujuoro|havutujuoro]] || [[word:havutushuoro|havutushuoro]] || [[word:havutukuoro|havutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
